nasb.text: Then you shall be left few in number, whereas you were as numerous as the stars of heaven, because you did not obey the Lord your God.

esv.text: Whereas you were as numerous as the stars of heaven, you shall be left few in number, because you did not obey the voice of the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 你們以前雖然像天上的星那麼多，現在剩下的人數卻寥寥可數，因為你不聽從耶和華你的　神的話。

ccb.text: 如果你们不听从你们的上帝耶和华的话，即使你们的人数多如天上的星，也将所剩无几。
